summary: RED: US-Israel-Iran war Day 9+: Escalations continue with Israel strikes on Beirut/Tehran, Ghanaian UN peacekeepers wounded in Lebanon missile attacks, Iran strikes US air center in Abu Dhabi, drone hit Dubai skyscraper, Tehran warns Europe of retaliation.
factors: Ghanaian UN peacekeepers wounded in Lebanon missile attacks (France24, 19h ago)
Israel broad-scale attacks on Tehran and Hezbollah in Beirut (NYT, 15h ago)
Iran struck US air-combat center in Abu Dhabi (Reuters, 2h ago)
Drone strike on Dubai's 23 Marina Tower, man killed by debris (Daily Mail, 49min ago)
Iran warns Europe: involvement makes them legitimate targets (Guardian, 16h ago)
Prior: Ongoing regional disruptions, oil/shipping impacts
